---
name: Security review tracking
about: Track external third-party security review scope, timeline, and outcomes
title: "[Security Review] <vendor> <window>"
labels: security, tracking
assignees: ''
---

## Review window

- Planned start:
- Planned end:
- Vendor/contact:

## Scope (must cover all)

- [ ] At-rest crypto and key derivation
- [ ] Metadata integrity verification
- [ ] Recovery/durability flows
- [ ] Import/export verification boundaries

## Deliverables

- [ ] Written report received
- [ ] Findings triaged by severity
- [ ] Remediation plan linked
- [ ] Public summary note added to Docs/Status

## Notes

Include references to remediation PRs/issues.
